_doc: Talk-prep cards (the chair's GATE-5): convert the two talks Mohamed requested into 60-second gates. STAGED — push when his queue drops under ~10 (queue discipline). Push via queue_decision.push_attributed.

cards.title: Jurisha's voice — the 60-second version of our talk
cards.why: You asked to talk this through. Here is the talk compressed: your ratified recipes already define a voice — warm, short, exact brand words, no selling poetry. The only open question is WHO speaks.
cards.need: Pick the speaker. Everything else (tone, length, laws) is already settled by your rulings.
cards.did: Built this from your 9 ratified recipes + your notes («not every caption needs its own voice, but the brand needs a voice tied to time and audience»).

options.label: 🏠 The brand speaks (warm Najdi home-food voice, adapts by audience)

cards.title: You said it twice: «Saudi doesn't have evergreen» — here's the replacement
cards.why: The word evergreen is stamped 347 times in every client's year map. Your correction needs a replacement name before we re-tag 1,400 slots.
cards.need: Pick the replacement for non-occasion days.
cards.did: Stopped showing you the word already (cards say 'daily'). The re-tag script is ready; it runs the moment you pick.

options.label: ✏️ You name it (write it in the note)
